query:
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) AS addedDate,
  name, priority, sector, projectState,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(sources, '$[0].label')) AS source1,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(sources, '$[1].label')) AS source2
FROM projects
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND suppressed = 0
ORDER BY createdAt ASC
LIMIT 40;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) AS addedDate,
  name, priority, sector, projectState,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(sources, '$[0].label')) AS source1,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(sources, '$[1].label')) AS source2
FROM projects
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND suppressed = 0
ORDER BY createdAt ASC
LIMIT 40;
